name: Qualitas Limited
analysis: QAL has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 28% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.9300, stop A$2.5097, target A$3.4008 (1.12:1) — then trail it.
